<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Publish grid point data"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/indexes/{name}/data"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Persists time-series data observations for the grid points of the named market index.
